name: The Scouring
descriptionSeed: The pure pole: unmaking as its own end. The Scouring stopped asking WHETHER a thing should end — the asking was the last thing they ended. They are calm, thorough, and they are working outward from the center of themselves.
encounterFlavor: The Scouring, who are unhurried and are ending things; ground where something used to be; the horrible relief of not having to decide anymore.
questSeeds: The Scouring have begun on a region and are perhaps a season from the border
An Unmaker of the Scour agrees with them about one specific thing, and it is the crack
worldPosNote: Deep expression of its Reach — placed near the equator on the the_unmade bearing. (SNG-180: authored position — WHERE it sits. Independent of axisVector, which is WHAT it is; a bastion is where the two disagree.)
